CustomField.formula: CASE( Hold_Code__c , "End Customer PO# Missing","Order Management", "Bill to Customer PO # Missing","Order Management", "Missing ship to information","Order Management", "Missing End Customer information","Order Management", "Missing Reseller information","Order Management", "Missing Shipment Terms (FCA)","Order Management", "Missing freight forwarder details","Order Management", "Delayed Ship Date","Order Management", "Missing EU PO#","Order Management","Verification of EU PO#","Order Management","Verification of End User PO","Order Management", "Correct Primary Quote is Synched","Sales", "Missing AWS Info","Sales", "Nonstandard Pricing/Terms Not Approved","Sales Ops", "Quote/PO Mismatch","Sales", "Missing Serial Numbers","Sales Ops", "Missing/Wrong Subscription Term","Sales Ops", "Support/subscription > 60 months","Sales", "Contingencies (Standard)","Sales Ops", "Product Not Released","Sales Ops", "Contingencies (ones-offs)","Sales Ops","")
CustomField.label: Resolution Owner
